title: Count Complete Tree Nodes
hints: Count the height of the leftmost path to the root. Then count the height of the rightmost path. If they match, the tree is perfectly full.
If the left and right heights differ, the last level is not full. Recurse on one side to find the missing nodes.
When heights differ, the missing nodes are in the subtree that is shorter. Add 1 for the current node and recurse accordingly.
